sourceNotes: Uttaranchal: Nityanand Swami/Bhagat Singh Koshyari CM (2001-2002), then N. D. Tiwari CM through December 2005. Main issues: Gairsain vs Dehradun capital controversy, Tehri dam submergence and safety audits, Char Dham highway projects, Pantnagar industrial expansions, local body elections. Built programmatically matching the schema and calibration constraints.

newsItems.title: Protests Over Gairsain Capital Demands (2001-01)
newsItems.description: Statehood activists hold demonstrations in Dehradun, demanding that the permanent capital of the new state be established in Gairsain rather than Dehradun.

reactionOptions.text: The state government defends Dehradun as the temporary administrative setup while studies are conducted, addressing the capital controversy issues.

risk.badOutcome: Delays in site surveys spark localized protests from hill activists groups in relation to capital controversy.

reactionOptions.text: Opposition Congress leaders support the activists, accusing the BJP of ignoring hill development, criticizing the handling of the capital controversy developments.

risk.badOutcome: The Congress criticism is ignored as the temporary Dehradun office functions smoothly regarding the capital controversy.

reactionOptions.text: A joint assembly commission is established to evaluate infrastructure requirements in Gairsain, seeking a consensus on the capital controversy situation.

risk.badOutcome: Liaison discussions are delayed by a lack of coordination in the planning commission in the capital controversy joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The Chief Secretary declines to comment on the projected cost of building a capital in Gairsain, citing the sensitivity of the capital controversy context.

newsItems.title: Tehri Dam Construction Safety Audit Ordered (2001-02)
newsItems.description: The state government orders a comprehensive safety and rehabilitation audit for the ongoing Tehri dam project, following environmental warnings of seismic activity in the Bhagirathi valley.

reactionOptions.text: The Power Department launches special verification camps to monitor rehabilitation files, addressing the tehri dam issues.

risk.badOutcome: Missing land records delay rehabilitation plots, drawing protests from Tehri displaced groups in relation to tehri dam.

reactionOptions.text: Opposition leaders claim the safety audits are mere paper announcements without teeth, criticizing the handling of the tehri dam developments.

risk.badOutcome: The safety criticism is ignored as grid officials welcome power prospects regarding the tehri dam.

reactionOptions.text: A joint committee of hydel engineers and local representatives is formed to monitor Tehri safety, seeking a consensus on the tehri dam situation.

risk.badOutcome: Liaison discussions are delayed by a lack of coordination in the municipal development board in the tehri dam joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The Tehri Project Director declines to comment on specific seismic study metrics, citing the sensitivity of the tehri dam context.

newsItems.title: Primary School Hill Teacher Quotas (2001-03)
newsItems.description: The state government outlines a draft policy prioritizing local hill candidates for primary teacher postings in remote blocks.

reactionOptions.text: The Education Department defends local recruitment as essential to reduce teacher absenteeism in remote hills, addressing the 2001 03 issues.

risk.badOutcome: Disputes over specific block project allocations stall municipal council meetings in relation to 2001 03.

reactionOptions.text: Opposition leaders demand that state recruitments remain open to candidates from plain districts, criticizing the handling of the 2001 03 developments.

risk.badOutcome: The opposition claims are labeled as exaggerated by political observers, limiting their public impact regarding the 2001 03.

reactionOptions.text: A joint committee of educators and block chiefs is formed to verify candidate qualifications, seeking a consensus on the 2001 03 situation.

risk.badOutcome: Disagreements over the tax sharing formula stall the municipal finance reforms in the 2001 03 joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The Education Director declines to comment on the number of vacant teacher posts in hill districts, citing the sensitivity of the 2001 03 context.

risk.badOutcome: Disagreements over the tax sharing formula stall the municipal finance reforms in the 2001 04 joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The Chief Conservator of Forests declines to comment on the specific weapons recovered from loggers, citing the sensitivity of the 2001 04 context.
